name: Email templates
description: Reusable email/reply snippets. Uses {{placeholders}} you fill in on copy.

snippets.label: Friendly greeting
snippets.text:
Hi {{name}},

Thanks for reaching out — happy to help.

snippets.label: Following up
snippets.text:
Hi {{name}},

Just following up on my note from {{date}}. Any thoughts?

snippets.label: Propose a meeting
snippets.text: Would {{day}} at {{time}} work for a quick {{duration}} call? Happy to adjust.

snippets.label: Confirm a meeting
snippets.text: Confirmed for {{day}} at {{time}}. I'll send a calendar invite shortly.

snippets.label: Acknowledge + timeline
snippets.text: Thanks, {{name}} — got it. I'll get back to you by {{date}}.

snippets.label: Politely decline
snippets.text: Thanks for thinking of me. I won't be able to take this on right now, but I appreciate the offer.

snippets.label: Thanks + next step
